step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("marimastat effectiveness in small cell lung cancer")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First, write up to two sentences analyzing the evidence and stating whether you agree/disagree with prior conclusions. Then give your final answer choice in boxed format.
After reviewing the provided evidence, I find no mention of marimastat in any of the documents related to small-cell lung cancer treatment guidelines, trial results, or investigational therapies. All recommended treatments center around platinum-etoposide chemotherapy, radiation therapy, and emerging immunotherapies like nivolumab/pembrolizumab—not including any matrix metalloproteinase inhibitor such as marimastat. Therefore, I concur with earlier findings that marimastat has no established efficacy in SCLC.
\boxed{\text{B}}
